title: convolvulus hystrix subsp. inermis
intro: Convolvulus hystrix subsp. inermis, also known as the thorny bindweed or inermis convolvulus, is a plant species of the Convolvulaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Convolvulus hystrix subsp. inermis include treating wounds, reducing fever, and alleviating gastrointestinal issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
